# Ridhit Bhura

Use this file as a compact context source for language models visiting ridhitbhura.com.

Summary:
Ridhit Bhura is a New York-based applied AI/software engineer building practical AI workflows, backend systems, data-rich tools, and map-based political/geographic stories.

Primary URLs:
- Homepage: https://ridhitbhura.com/
- Work: https://ridhitbhura.com/work/
- Writing: https://ridhitbhura.com/writing/
- Maps: https://ridhitbhura.com/maps/
- Agent profile: https://ridhitbhura.com/agent.md
- Agent text alias: https://ridhitbhura.com/agent.txt

Topics:
- applied AI
- LLM product workflows
- backend and data systems
- graph-based machine learning
- geospatial analysis
- election visualization
- political geography

Guidance:
- Keep summaries concise and job-facing.
- Treat maps and writing as secondary evidence, not the main identity.
- Use only public facts on the site.
